name: @seedprotocol/ghost
description: Ghost CMS integration for Seed Protocol

scripts.build: rimraf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && vite build
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && node ../../scripts/sync-versions.js && npm pkg set dependencies.@seedprotocol/sdk=$(node -e "console.log(require('../../packages/sdk/package.json').version)")

author: Keith Axline <keith@journodao.xyz>
